problem.title: HDL-Graph-SLAM on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does HDL-Graph-SLAM perform on the second public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarsen registration and submap density while trimming keyframe and loop-closure work for faster pose-graph updates.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Densify registration and submaps while keeping every keyframe and loop-closure constraint active.
